message:
feat(wa): add format output option to prepare commands and improve test formatting

Adds JSON output format support to prepare commands for robot mode
compatibility and improves test code formatting.

CLI changes:
- Add --format/-f flag to `wa prepare send` (default: plain)
- Add --format/-f flag to `wa prepare workflow run` (default: plain)
- New output structs: PrepareOutput, PrepareApprovalOutput, PrepareCommitHint
- JSON output includes plan_id, plan_hash, expires_at, approval info

Test formatting:
- Break long assertion chains across multiple lines for readability
- Consistent formatting in dry_run.rs tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
